calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Salt Bay Industries, Inc., Bruce Hallbert And John Rottkamp (Notices)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18:10 a.m. and concluding at 10:36:58 a.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., a Washington Limited Liability Company represented by Mark M. Scott, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Salt Bay Industries, Inc., Bruce Hallbert and John Rottkamp, a New York Corporation not appearing.

MATTHEW JACOBS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Equipment Finance Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Acceptance Certificate
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - UCC Financing Statement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Personal Guaranty
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Collection Agency Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Payment History
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - Demand for Payment
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 8 - Account Balance Statement

Court examines counsel for Plaintiff and Plaintiff's witness.
Plaintiff's witness attests that statements by counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, Declaration of Matthew Jacobs with exhibits attached, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., a Washington Limited Liability Company, and against Defendant Salt Bay Industries, Inc., Bruce Hallbert and John Rottkamp, as follows:

Counsel for Plaintiff's request for attorney fees is DENIED.

Damages: $52,030.79
Costs: $1,126.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $53,156.79

Orion is to recover from Defendants Salt Bay Industries, Inc., Bruce Hallbert and John Rottkamp the following personal property: One (1) Hyundai R160LC-9A Hyd Excavator s/n H2505KD0000017. If Orion obtains possession of this personal property and sells it at a sale, Orion shall apply the proceeds from any such sale, net of any sale and recovery costs and expenses, to reduce the amount owed by Salt Bay Industries, Inc., Bruce Hallbert and John Rottkamp under this Judgment after such sale has occurred.

Proposed judgment signed as modified and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
